explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Sprouts Farmers Market's Form 10-K Annual Report 2024 mentions the integration of AI and machine learning for advancing automation and generating real-time insights, indicating a strategic direction and management oversight. The company also references a policy requirement for careful handling of sensitive company data, particularly concerning AI vendor privacy and data security. Furthermore, it references the need for human oversight, critical analysis of AI outputs, and transparency regarding AI system behavior and evolution.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Form 10-K Annual Report 2024" from Sprouts Farmers Market provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency**. The report mentions the integration of AI and machine learning for advancing automation and generating real-time insights, indicating a strategic direction and management oversight, which supports governance. Furthermore, the statement of intent to use these technologies, without detailed execution, offers transparency into the company's approach to emerging technologies.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report 2024

relevant_sources.summary: This podcast transcript provides evidence for the **governance**, **oversight**, **privacy**, and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights concerns regarding AI vendor privacy and data security, indicating a policy requirement for careful handling of sensitive company data. The discussion also touches on the need for human oversight and critical analysis of AI outputs, as well as transparency about AI system behavior and evolution.
relevant_sources.title: Workday Podcast with Sprouts Farmers Market CAO

oversight.findings: The company references the need for human oversight and critical analysis of AI outputs.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

summary.overall_findings: Sprouts Farmers Market's Form 10-K Annual Report 2024 indicates a strategic direction and management oversight for AI and machine learning, while also stating an intent to use these technologies. These disclosures, along with other published materials, address 4 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars at the policy level, including oversight and privacy. The company references the need for human oversight and critical analysis of AI outputs, and highlights concerns regarding AI vendor privacy and data security. Based on 5 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 1 additional pillar.
